docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANG, BO HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-2025 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75800495) ***(SEE ORDER STRIKING FILING FOR FAILURE TO PAY COURT FEES FILED ON 4/18/25)*** FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANG, BO AS TO DEFENDANT TWITCH AMAZON NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-06-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-06-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-14-2025
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 75800495) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANG, BO
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANG, BO

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON MAR-26-2025 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF BO SHANG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. APPLICANT HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-06-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

FEES NOT PAID. AN ORDER DENYING APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS WAS FILED ON 3/26/25. THE COURT GAVE TIMELY NOTICE TO PAY THE APPLICABLE FEE. COURT FEES WERE NOT PAID WITHIN THE TIME SPECIFIED. COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF BO SHANG IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SHANG, BO
